mapper.delete: DELETE FROM purchase_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 100
mapper.select:
SELECT [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR (10)) AS [createDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , 0 AS stockQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS warehouseNo , '' AS storageSpacesNo , '' AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty , 1 as rate, 0 as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ORDER] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY] >[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY] AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIPT_CLOSE] = '0' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[CLOSE]= '0' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST(A.[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),B.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0)AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM(B.[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,1 as rate,0 as [keep] FROM SALES_ISSUE AS A INNER JOIN SALES_ISSUE_D AS B ON B.SALES_ISSUE_ID = A.SALES_ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLY_SYNERGY AS SUPPLY_SYNERGY ON B.[SYNERGY_ID] = SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_ID] LEFT JOIN [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] AS [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] ON B.[SYNERGY_D_ID] = [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON B.[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = B.[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON B.[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_RTK] =N'PLANT' AND [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D.SUPPLIER_ID = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON B.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND A.[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND A.[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND B.[BUSINESS_QTY] >'0' AND SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_TYPE] IN (N'2' , N'4') AND B.[PURCHASE_ARRIVALED]= '0' GROUP BY A.[DOC_NO] , A.[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , B.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR (10)) AS [createDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , 0 AS stockQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]+[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]+[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]+[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]), PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]+[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 , SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty , 1 as rate, 0 as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL] AS [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D] AS [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID] = [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] AS [WAREHOUSE] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID]=[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] AS [BIN] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[BIN_ID]=[BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] AS [ITEM_LOT] ON [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID]=[ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[CATEGORY]=N'36' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]= #{site} AND [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[DOC_NO] =#{docNo} AND [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPT_CLOSE]=N'0' AND ([PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY] + [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY] - [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY] ) > 0 AND [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY] <> [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR (10)) AS [createDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty] AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName--参考单位名称 , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty], ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty], ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceDocQty AS sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceValuationQty AS sourceValuationQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) ='0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate, ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_RETURN] AS [PURCHASE_RETURN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[PLANT_ID] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN (select [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.[WAREHOUSE_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.BIN_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_LOT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE], SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] ,[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID ,SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty from [PURCHASE_RETURN_D] WHERE [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE]=N'0' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.[WAREHOUSE_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.BIN_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_LOT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE] ,[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID) AS [PURCHASE_RETURN_D] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID]=[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID ,SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] ,SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK ='OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE = #{warehouseNo} GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID ) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID]=[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].WAREHOUSE_ID OR [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].BIN_ID OR [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].BIN_ID= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID =[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].ITEM_LOT_ID= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE [PURCHASE_RETURN].[CATEGORY]=N'39' AND [PURCHASE_RETURN].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE ]=N'0' AND [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} GROUP BY [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceValuationQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT
UNION ALL
SELECT [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR (10)) AS [createDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , SUM([PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY) AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName--参考单位名称 , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY AS sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_QTY AS sourceValuationQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) ='0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate, ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ISSUE] AS [PURCHASE_ISSUE] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].Owner_Org_ROid = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN PURCHASE_ISSUE_D ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID]=[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID ,SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] ,SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK ='OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE = #{warehouseNo} GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID ,[ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID ) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID]=[PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].WAREHOUSE_ID OR [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BIN_ID OR [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BIN_ID= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID =[PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].ITEM_LOT_ID= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[ApproveStatus]=N'N' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_QTY , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR (10)) AS [createDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , 0 AS stockQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , '' AS storageSpacesNo , '' AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]), ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty , SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty FROM [PURCHASE_ORDER] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.ITEM_PLANT ON [ITEM_PLANT].[Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [ITEM_PLANT].[Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] AND [ITEM_PLANT].[ITEM_ID]=[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY] >[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY] AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIPT_CLOSE] = '0' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[CLOSE]= '0' AND [ITEM_PLANT].[INSPECT_MODE] <>'2' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE]
UNION ALL
SELECT A.[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST(A.[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),B.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0)AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM(B.[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty FROM SALES_ISSUE AS A INNER JOIN SALES_ISSUE_D AS B ON B.SALES_ISSUE_ID = A.SALES_ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLY_SYNERGY AS SUPPLY_SYNERGY ON B.[SYNERGY_ID] = SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_ID] LEFT JOIN [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] AS [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] ON B.[SYNERGY_D_ID] = [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON B.[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = B.[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON B.[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_RTK] =N'PLANT' AND [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D.SUPPLIER_ID = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON B.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = B.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.ITEM_PLANT ON [ITEM_PLANT].[Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [ITEM_PLANT].[Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] AND [ITEM_PLANT].[ITEM_ID]=B.[ITEM_ID] WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]=#{site} AND A.[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND A.[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND B.[BUSINESS_QTY] >'0' AND SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_TYPE] IN (N'2' , N'4') AND B.[PURCHASE_ARRIVALED]= '0' AND [ITEM_PLANT].[INSPECT_MODE] <>'2' GROUP BY A.[DOC_NO] , A.[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , B.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO AS docNo, PURCHASE_ORDER.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME AS supplierFullName, CONVERT(CHAR(8), PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE, 112) AS docDate, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.SequenceNumber AS serialNumber from PURCHASE_ORDER_D LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID
where PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO LIKE concat('%', #{docNo}, '%') and PURCHASE_ORDER.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME LIKE concat('%', #{supplierFullName}, '%') and PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE LIKE concat('%', #{docDate}, '%') and ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE concat('%', #{itemCode}, '%') AND PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.RECEIPT_CLOSE = '0' AND PURCHASE_ORDER.[CLOSE] = '0' ORDER BY DOC_DATE DESC

SELECT top 100 [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST([PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[SequenceNumber] AS xh ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemDescription] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpecification] -- ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY1 + PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY2 + PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY3 +PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY4 AS ALL_Packing_QTY ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitCode] ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS businessQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS recordQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY])AS [recoverQty] ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY])AS [thisArrivalQty] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID,0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep
,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY])AS defaultQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY])/SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS valuationRate FROM [PURCHASE_ORDER] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='1' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]>[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY] AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIPT_CLOSE] = '0' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[CLOSE]= '0'
and PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO LIKE concat('%', #{docNo},'%')
and PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE >= concat(#{startDate},' 00:00:00.0000000')
and PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE <= concat(#{endDate},' 23:59:59.0000000')
and (PURCHASE_ORDER.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME LIKE concat('%', #{supplierFullName},'%') or SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE LIKE concat('%', #{supplierFullName},'%')) GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] ,[ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[SequenceNumber] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID ,UNIT.UNIT_ID ,ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID order by PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE DESC, PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO asc, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.SequenceNumber asc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PO_QC_RESULT (PO_QC_RESULT_ID, REMARK, ApproveStatus, ApproveDate, ApproveBy, CreateDate, LastModifiedDate, ModifiedDate, CreateBy, LastModifiedBy, ModifiedBy, Owner_Org_RTK, Owner_Org_ROid, SOURCE_ID_RTK, SOURCE_ID_ROid) VALUES (#{uuid}, #{dto.remark}, 'Y', #{dto.time}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, 'PLANT', #{dto.departmentId}, 'PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D', (select PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID from PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D inner join ITEM on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID left join PURCHASE_ARRIVAL on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID where ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{dto.itemCode} and PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO = #{dto.docNo} ))

INSERT INTO PO_QC_RESULT_D (PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID, QC_DATE, QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY, REMARK, PO_INSPECTION_CODE, DETERMINE_QTY, QC_TIMES, CreateDate, LastModifiedDate, ModifiedDate, CreateBy, LastModifiedBy, ModifiedBy, PO_QC_RESULT_ID,RESULT_STATUS) VALUES (#{uuid2}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.qualifiedBusinessQty}, #{dto.unQualifiedBusinessQty}, #{dto.inDestroyedBusinessQty}, #{dto.remark}, '1', #{dto.determineQty}, '1', #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{uuid1},#{dto.resultStatus})

INSERT INTO PO_QC_RESULT_SD (SequenceNumber, ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY, SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY, SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY, RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY, QC_DATE, REMARK, PO_QC_RESULT_SD_ID, DEDUCT_ARRIVED_QTY, GENERATE_SOURCE, ApproveStatus, ApproveDate, ApproveBy, CreateDate, LastModifiedDate, ModifiedDate, CreateBy, LastModifiedBy, ModifiedBy, PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID) VALUES ('1', #{dto.acceptedBusinessQty}, #{dto.spReceiptBusinessQty}, #{dto.scrapBusinessQty}, #{dto.returnBusinessQty}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.remark}, #{uuid3}, '0', '0', 'Y', #{dto.time}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.time}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{dto.employeeId}, #{uuid2})
mapper.update: update PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D set PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY= #{acceptedBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_INVENTORY_QTY = #{acceptedBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_INVENTORY_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY = #{returnBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY = #{scrapBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.INSPECTION_STATUS= #{ArrivalResultStatus}, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SCRAPED_BUSINESS_QTY= #{scrapBusinessQty}+ PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SCRAPED_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.INSPECTED_QTY= #{thisCheckQty} + PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.INSPECTED_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY= '0', PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SP_RECEIPT_INVENTORY_QTY= '0', PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY= #{qualifiedBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY= #{unQualifiedBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY= #{inDestroyedBusinessQty}+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY where PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = (select PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID from PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D inner join ITEM on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID left join PURCHASE_ARRIVAL on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID where ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode} and PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO = #{docNo})

update PO_QC_RESULT_D set QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY = QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY+#{qualifiedBusinessQty}, UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY = UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY + #{unQualifiedBusinessQty}, IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY = IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY + #{inDestroyedBusinessQty}, RESULT_STATUS = #{resultStatus}, LastModifiedDate = #{time}, ModifiedDate = #{time}, LastModifiedBy = #{employeeId}, ModifiedBy = #{employeeId} where PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID = (select PO_QC_RESULT_D.PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID from PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D inner join ITEM on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID left join PURCHASE_ARRIVAL on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID left join PO_QC_RESULT ON PO_QC_RESULT.SOURCE_ID_ROid = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN PO_QC_RESULT_D ON PO_QC_RESULT_D.PO_QC_RESULT_ID = PO_QC_RESULT.PO_QC_RESULT_ID where ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode} and PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO = #{docNo})

update PO_QC_RESULT_SD set ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY = ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + #{acceptedBusinessQty}, SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY = SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + #{spReceiptBusinessQty}, SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY = SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY + #{scrapBusinessQty}, RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY = RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY + #{returnBusinessQty}, ApproveDate = #{time}, ApproveBy = #{employeeId}, LastModifiedDate =#{time}, ModifiedDate =#{time}, LastModifiedBy = #{employeeId}, ModifiedBy = #{employeeId} where PO_QC_RESULT_SD.PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID = (select PO_QC_RESULT_SD.PO_QC_RESULT_SD_ID from PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D inner join ITEM on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID left join PURCHASE_ARRIVAL on PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID left join PO_QC_RESULT ON PO_QC_RESULT.SOURCE_ID_ROid = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN PO_QC_RESULT_D ON PO_QC_RESULT_D.PO_QC_RESULT_ID = PO_QC_RESULT.PO_QC_RESULT_ID LEFT JOIN PO_QC_RESULT_SD ON PO_QC_RESULT_SD.PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID = PO_QC_RESULT_D.PO_QC_RESULT_D_ID where ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode} and PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO = #{docNo})

UPDATE PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION SET INSPECTION_QTY = #{inspectionQty}, ACCEPTABLE_QTY = #{acceptableQty}, UNQUALIFIED_QTY = #{unqualifiedQty}, DESTROYED_QTY = #{destroyedQty}, DECISION = #{decision}, REINSPECTION = #{reinspection}, DECISION_DESCRIPTION = #{decisionDescription}, PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION.Owner_Dept = #{departmentUUID}, PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION.Owner_Emp = #{employeeUUID}, UDF001 = #{defectRepairQty}, UDF025 = #{defectNumReason} WHERE DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo};

UPDATE PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D SET INSPECTION_QTY = #{inspectionQty}, INSPECTION_AC = #{inspectionAc}, INSPECTION_RE = #{inspectionRe}, INSPECTION_QQ = #{defectiveQty}, DECISION = #{decision}, DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID = #{defectReasonUuid}, IMPACT_RESULT = #{impactResult}, STANDARD_VALUE = #{standardValue}, STANDARD_MAX = #{standardMax}, STANDARD_MIN = #{standardMin}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D_ID = #{uuid}

UPDATE PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D SET QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{acceptableQty}, UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{unqualifiedQty}, IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{destroyedQty}, INSPECTED_QTY=#{inspectionQty}, JUDGED_QTY=#{inspectionQty}, ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{acceptableQty}, ACCEPTED_INVENTORY_QTY =#{acceptableQty}, RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY =#{unqualifiedQty}, SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY =#{unqualifiedQty}, SHOULD_SETTLE_PRICE_QTY =#{acceptableQty}, INSPECTION_STATUS ='4' WHERE PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID IN ( SELECT C.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID FROM PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION AS A LEFT JOIN PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D AS B ON B.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D_ID = A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D AS C ON C.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo})
UPDATE deliveryList set arrivalNo = #{docNo} WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
mapper.select:
SELECT PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO AS docNo, CONVERT(CHAR(8), PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE, 112) AS docDate, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierCode, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SequenceNumber as xh, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemDescription, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpecification, SUM(PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY+PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY-PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY) AS applyQty, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseCode, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE,' ') AS binCode, ISNULL(BIN.BIN_NAME,' ') AS binName, ISNULL(UNIT.UNIT_CODE,' ') AS unitCode, PO_QC_RESULT_D.QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY+PO_QC_RESULT_D.UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY+PO_QC_RESULT_D.IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY AS checkQty, ISNULL(PO_QC_RESULT.REMARK,' ') as remark FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.SUPPLIER_ID = SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PO_QC_RESULT ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = PO_QC_RESULT.SOURCE_ID_ROid LEFT JOIN PO_QC_RESULT_D ON PO_QC_RESULT.PO_QC_RESULT_ID = PO_QC_RESULT_D.PO_QC_RESULT_ID WHERE PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.CATEGORY = N'36'
AND PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and (SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME like concat('%',#{supplier},'%') or SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE like concat('%',#{supplier},'%'))
and PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE like concat('%',#{docDate},'%')
AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE= '2' AND PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.ApproveStatus=N'Y' AND PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RECEIPT_CLOSE=N'0' /*允收业务数量+特采业务数量-已入库业务数量 > 0*/ AND (PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY - PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY ) > 0 /*拒收业务数量 !=业务数量*/ AND PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RETURN_BUSINESS_QTY <> PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.BUSINESS_QTY GROUP BY PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE , SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE , SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME , BIN.BIN_CODE , BIN.BIN_NAME ,UNIT.UNIT_CODE ,PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SequenceNumber ,PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SequenceNumber, PO_QC_RESULT_D.QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, PO_QC_RESULT.REMARK, PO_QC_RESULT_D.UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY, PO_QC_RESULT_D.IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY ORDER BY CONVERT(CHAR(8), PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE, 112) DESC, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO ASC, xh ASC

SELECT PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO, CONVERT(CHAR(8), PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE, 112) AS DOC_DATE, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, SUM(PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY - PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY) AS applyQty, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME, BIN.BIN_CODE, BIN.BIN_NAME, UNIT.UNIT_CODE FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.SUPPLIER_ID = SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID WHERE PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.CATEGORY = N'37' AND PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO = #{docNo}
GROUP BY PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_NO , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.DOC_DATE , SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE , SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME , BIN.BIN_CODE , BIN.BIN_NAME , UNIT.UNIT_CODE

SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.BUSINESS_QTY, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE as SUPPLIER_NO, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY1 + PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY2 + PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY3 + PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY4 AS ALL_Packing_QTY, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, CONVERT(CHAR(8), PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE, 112) AS DOC_DATE, CAST(PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE AS DATE) AS DOC_DATE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE, SUM(PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.BUSINESS_QTY - PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY) AS RECORD_QTY, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.SequenceNumber as xh from PURCHASE_ORDER_D LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER ON PURCHASE_ORDER.SUPPLIER_ID = SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD ON PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID where PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO LIKE concat('%', #{docNo}, '%') and ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE concat('%', #{itemCode}, '%') AND PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.RECEIPT_CLOSE = '0' AND PURCHASE_ORDER.[CLOSE] = '0' group by PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.BUSINESS_QTY, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY1, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY2, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY3, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PACKING_QTY4, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE, PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.BUSINESS_QTY, PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.SequenceNumber order by PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_DATE DESC, PURCHASE_ORDER.DOC_NO, PURCHASE_ORDER_D.SequenceNumber

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate, ISNULL(D.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N'') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(D.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N'') AS departmentName, C.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierNo, C.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, '' AS customerNo, '' AS customerName, '' AS employeeNo, '' AS employeeName FROM PURCHASE_RETURN AS A INNER JOIN PURCHASE_RETURN_D AS B ON A.PURCHASE_RETURN_ID = B.PURCHASE_RETURN_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.PLANT_ID = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLIER AS C ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = C.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ON A.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS D ON A.Owner_Dept = D.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ISSUE_D AS E ON E.SOURCE_ID_ROid = B.PURCHASE_RETURN_D_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'Y' -- AND A.ISSUE_STATUS IN (N'1', N'2') -- AND E.PURCHASE_ISSUE_D_ID IS NULL
A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate, ISNULL(D.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N'') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(D.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N'') AS departmentName, C.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierNo, C.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, '' AS customerNo, '' AS customerName, '' AS employeeNo, '' AS employeeName FROM PURCHASE_ISSUE AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLIER AS C ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = C.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS E ON A.Owner_Emp = E.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS D ON A.Owner_Dept = D.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN PURCHASE_ISSUE_D AS B ON A.PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID = B.PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'N'

SELECT [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty] AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseCode , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS binCode , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty], ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,[PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty],ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceDocQty AS sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceValuationQty AS sourceValuationQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_RETURN] AS [PURCHASE_RETURN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[PLANT_ID] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN (select [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.[WAREHOUSE_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.BIN_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_LOT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE], SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] - [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUED_BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty , SUM([PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty from [PURCHASE_RETURN_D] WHERE [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE] = N'0' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.[WAREHOUSE_ID], PURCHASE_RETURN_D.BIN_ID, PURCHASE_RETURN_D.ITEM_LOT_ID, [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID) AS [PURCHASE_RETURN_D] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[PURCHASE_RETURN_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].WAREHOUSE_ID OR [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].BIN_ID OR [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID = [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] -- WHERE [PURCHASE_RETURN].[ApproveStatus] = N'Y' -- AND [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ISSUE_CLOSE] = N'0' AND [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} GROUP BY [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_RETURN].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].[applyQty] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_RETURN_D].sourceValuationQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT
UNION ALL
SELECT [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , SUM([PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY) AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName--参考单位名称 , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseCode , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS binCode , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY, [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY AS sourceDocQty , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_QTY AS sourceValuationQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ISSUE] AS [PURCHASE_ISSUE] LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS D ON PURCHASE_ISSUE.Owner_Dept = D.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].Owner_Org_ROid = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN PURCHASE_ISSUE_D ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[PURCHASE_ISSUE_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].WAREHOUSE_ID OR [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BIN_ID OR [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID = [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] -- WHERE [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[ApproveStatus] = N'N' AND [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_NO] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE].[DOC_DATE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] , [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].BUSINESS_QTY , [PURCHASE_ISSUE_D].PRICE_QTY , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST([PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]) ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,1 as rate,0 as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ORDER] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='1' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]>[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY] AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIPT_CLOSE] = '0' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[CLOSE]= '0' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] ,[ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID ,UNIT.UNIT_ID ,ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID ,ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID
UNION ALL SELECT A.[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST(A.[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),B.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0)AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM(B.[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,1 as rate,0 as [keep] FROM SALES_ISSUE AS A INNER JOIN SALES_ISSUE_D AS B ON B.SALES_ISSUE_ID = A.SALES_ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLY_SYNERGY AS SUPPLY_SYNERGY ON B.[SYNERGY_ID] = SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_ID] LEFT JOIN [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] AS [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] ON B.[SYNERGY_D_ID] = [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON B.[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = B.[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON B.[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_RTK] =N'PLANT' AND [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D.SUPPLIER_ID = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON B.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='2' AND A.[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND A.[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND B.[BUSINESS_QTY]>'0' AND SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_TYPE] IN (N'2', N'4') AND B.[PURCHASE_ARRIVALED]= '0' GROUP BY A.[DOC_NO] ,A.[DOC_DATE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] ,[ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID ,UNIT.UNIT_ID ,ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID ,B.PRICE_UNIT_ID ,ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST([PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]) ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0) AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]-[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM([PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,1 as rate,0 as [keep] FROM [PURCHASE_ORDER] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_D] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] AS [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_RTK]=N'PLANT' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid]=[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON [PURCHASE_ORDER].[SUPPLIER_ID] = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON [PURCHASE_ORDER_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = PURCHASE_ORDER_SD.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='1' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[BUSINESS_QTY]>[PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[ARRIVED_BUSINESS_QTY] AND [PURCHASE_ORDER_SD].[RECEIPT_CLOSE] = '0' AND [PURCHASE_ORDER].[CLOSE]= '0' GROUP BY [PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_NO] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER].[DOC_DATE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] ,[ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] ,[PURCHASE_ORDER_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID ,UNIT.UNIT_ID ,ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID ,PURCHASE_ORDER_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID ,ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID
UNION ALL SELECT A.[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] ,CAST(A.[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [createDate] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] AS [supplierNo] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] AS [supplierName] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemNo] ,ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode] ,'' AS stockCode ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] ,0 AS stockQty ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY])AS [applyQty] ,0 AS [scanSumQty] ,'' AS customerNo ,'' AS customerName ,'' AS warehouseNo ,'' AS storageSpacesNo ,'' AS lotNo ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName --交易单位名称 ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) ,ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 ,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),B.PRICE_UNIT_ID,0)AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty --库存单位数量 ,SUM(B.[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty ,SUM(B.[PRICE_QTY]) AS sourceValuationQty ,1 as rate,0 as [keep] FROM SALES_ISSUE AS A INNER JOIN SALES_ISSUE_D AS B ON B.SALES_ISSUE_ID = A.SALES_ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN SUPPLY_SYNERGY AS SUPPLY_SYNERGY ON B.[SYNERGY_ID] = SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_ID] LEFT JOIN [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] AS [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D] ON B.[SYNERGY_D_ID] = [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON B.[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = B.[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON B.[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_RTK] =N'PLANT' AND [SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D].[TO_Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [SUPPLIER] ON SUPPLY_SYNERGY_FI_D.SUPPLIER_ID = [SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 --计价单位 ON B.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='1' AND A.[ApproveStatus]=N'Y' AND A.[DOC_NO]=#{docNo} AND B.[BUSINESS_QTY]>'0' AND SUPPLY_SYNERGY.[SUPPLY_TYPE] IN (N'2', N'4') AND B.[PURCHASE_ARRIVALED]= '0' GROUP BY A.[DOC_NO] ,A.[DOC_DATE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_CODE] ,[SUPPLIER].[SUPPLIER_NAME] ,[ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] ,[ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,B.[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] ,B.[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] ,[UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE ,UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME ,UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID ,UNIT.UNIT_ID ,ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID ,B.PRICE_UNIT_ID ,ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT DISTINCT D.parentId, Z.UDF003 containerQty, Z.UDF024 containerName, CAST(CAST(Z.LONG AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.HIGH AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.WIDE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS containerDetail, D.purchaseOrder, deliveryNumber, purchaseOrder docNo, ISNULL(lot_att04, '') arrivalNo, ISNULL(lot_att30,'') lot_att30,
FORMAT(create_date, 'yyyyMMdd') docDate, vendorCode supplierNo, delivery supplierName, item_no itemCode, M.ITEM_NAME itemName, M.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, ISNULL(Z.UDF021,'') binCode, qty matchQty, barcode, B.UDF021 customerNo, bm_barcode_detail.unit_no unitCode, bm_barcode_detail.unit_name unitName, consignee shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid=Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE bar_type = 4
and deliveryNumber = #{number}
ORDER BY item_no
