SELECT B.SequenceNumber AS sequenceNumber, B.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D_ID AS uuid, B.SEQUENCE AS sequence, INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_CODE AS inspectionItemCode, INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_NAME AS inspectionItemName, INSPECTION_ITEM.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS inspectionItemDescription, B.DEFECT_CLASS AS defectClass, B.INSPECTION_QTY AS inspectionQty, B.INSPECTION_AC AS inspectionAc, B.INSPECTION_RE AS inspectionRe, B.INSPECTION_QQ AS defectiveQty, DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DESCRIPTION AS defectiveReasonDescription, DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID defectReasonUuid, B.DECISION AS decision, B.IMPACT_RESULT AS impactResult, B.STANDARD_VALUE AS standardValue, B.STANDARD_MAX AS standardMax, B.STANDARD_MIN AS standardMin, B.QC_MAX AS qcMax, B.QC_MIN AS qcMin, B.REMARK AS remark, ISNULL(B.UDF026,'') AS UDF026 FROM PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D B LEFT OUTER JOIN PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION A ON B.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID = A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN INSPECTION_ITEM ON INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID = B.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN DEFECTIVE_REASONS ON DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID = B.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo}

SELECT DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID defectReasonUuid, DEFECTIVE_REASONS_CODE AS defectiveReasonsCode, DESCRIPTION AS description, DEFECTIVE_TYPE AS defectiveType FROM DEFECTIVE_REASONS WHERE DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reason}, '%') OR DEFECTIVE_REASONS_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reason}, '%') OR DEFECTIVE_TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reason}, '%')

SELECT Z.UDF003 containerQty, Z.UDF024 containerName, CAST(CAST(Z.LONG AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.HIGH AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.WIDE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS containerDetail, lot_att04 arrivalNo, D.purchaseOrder, deliveryNumber, purchaseOrder docNo, FORMAT(create_date, 'yyyyMMdd') docDate, vendorCode supplierNo, delivery supplierName, item_no itemCode, M.ITEM_NAME itemName, B.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, Z.UDF021 binCode, qty matchQty, barcode, B.UDF021 customerNo, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, U.UNIT_NAME unitName, consignee shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid = Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId
barcode = #{number}
mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T (LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS) values (#{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus})

insert into LSMD_T (LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS) values (#{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus})

insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD037, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS, LSMD036 ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd037}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus}, #{lsmd036} )

insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD033, LSMD037, LSMD038,LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047,LSMD048, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS, LSMD036 ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd037}, #{lsmd038},#{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047},#{lsmd048}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus}, #{lsmd036} )

INSERT INTO WMS..inv_barcode_operation ( id, doc_org_no, org_no, warehouse_no, cell_no, item_no, barcode, create_by, create_date, update_by, create_flag, lot_att02, lot_att03, lot_att04, lot_att05, lot_att06 ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.docOrgNo}, #{item.orgNo}, #{item.warehouseNo}, #{item.cellNo}, #{item.itemNo}, #{item.barcode}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.createFlag}, #{item.lotAtt02}, #{item.lotAtt03}, #{item.lotAtt04}, #{item.lotAtt05}, #{item.lotAtt06} )
mapper.select: SELECT DisplayName fileName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX), A.Content), 2) AS content FROM INSPECTION_PLAN P LEFT JOIN ITEM ON P.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID CROSS APPLY ( SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(Split.GUID.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'))) AS GUID FROM ( SELECT CAST( '<x>' + REPLACE( SUBSTRING( CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), P.Attachments), CHARINDEX(':', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), P.Attachments)) + 1, LEN(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), P.Attachments)) ), ';', '</x><x>' ) + '</x>' AS XML) AS String ) AS A CROSS APPLY A.String.nodes('/x') AS Split(GUID) ) AS Split LEFT JOIN BigObjectInfo B ON Split.GUID = B.BigObjectInfoId LEFT JOIN ContentBlock A ON A.ContentBlockId = B.Code WHERE ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode}

SELECT C.DOC_NO AS oddNumber,C.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME AS supplierFullName,D.UDF021 AS customerNumber,WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode FROM PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION A LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D B ON B.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON B.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER C ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D D ON D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AND A.ITEM_ID = D.ITEM_ID WHERE A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID = #{inspectionUuid} AND A.ApproveStatus = 'Y' AND A.DECISION = '1'

SELECT DISTINCT B.SequenceNumber xh,D.UDF021 AS customerNo,C.DOC_NO AS purchaseNo,ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode,ITEM.ITEM_NAME itemName,WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode,WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL A LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D B ON A.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = B.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON B.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER C ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D D ON D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} ORDER BY B.SequenceNumber
SELECT SS.uuid FROM deliveryList SS LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT('%', #{docNo}, '%')

SELECT Z.UDF003 containerQty, Z.UDF024 containerName, CAST(CAST(Z.LONG AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.HIGH AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.WIDE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS containerDetail, lot_att04 arrivalNo, D.purchaseOrder, deliveryNumber, purchaseOrder docNo, lot_att04 arrivalNo, FORMAT(create_date, 'yyyyMMdd') docDate, vendorCode supplierNo, delivery supplierName, item_no itemCode, M.ITEM_NAME itemName, B.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, Z.UDF021 binCode, qty matchQty, barcode, B.UDF021 customerNo, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, U.UNIT_NAME unitName, consignee shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid = Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE barcode IN
#{item} ;

SELECT DISTINCT SS.uuid FROM deliveryList SS LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE
D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT('%',#{docNo}, '%')

SELECT I.ITEM_CODE itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME itemName, I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL A LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D B ON A.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = B.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{arrivalNo}

SELECT DISTINCT Q.帐号 FROM WMS..warehouseStaff W LEFT JOIN QYWX Q ON Q.姓名 = W.employeeName WHERE W.type = 'QC' AND W.warehouseCode IN
#{warehouseCode}

SELECT DISTINCT Q.帐号 FROM WMS..warehouseStaff W LEFT JOIN QYWX Q ON Q.姓名 = W.employeeName WHERE W.type = 'CG' AND W.warehouseCode IN
#{warehouseCode}

SELECT A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID inspectionUuid, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS plantCode, DOC.DOC_NAME AS checkName, A.DOC_NO AS checkDocNo, D.DOC_NO AS arrivalDocNo, C.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID AS arrivalDUuid, C.SequenceNumber AS arrivalDSequenceNumber, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierCode, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME AS departmentName, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, D.SUPPLIER_ORDER_NO AS receiptNo, CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(datetime, A.CreateDate), 120) AS createDate, CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(datetime, D.DOC_DATE), 120) AS receiptDate, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, C.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName, C.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AS itemFeatureId, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE AS lotCode, ITEM_LOT.LOT_DESCRIPTION AS lotDescription, ITEM_LOT.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS effectiveDate, ITEM_LOT.INEFFECTIVE_DATE AS ineffectiveDate, A.INSPECTION_QTY AS inspectionQty, A.STRICTNESS_DEGREE AS strictnessDegree, A.ACCEPTABLE_QTY AS acceptableQty, A.UNQUALIFIED_QTY AS unqualifiedQty, A.DESTROYED_QTY AS destroyedQty, A.DECISION AS decision, A.REINSPECTION AS reinspection, A.RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, A.DECISION_DESCRIPTION AS decisionDescription, QC_TIMES AS qcTimes, CASE WHEN A.UDF026 IS NULL OR A.UDF026 = '' THEN 'true' ELSE A.UDF026 END AS UDF026 FROM PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION AS A LEFT JOIN PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D AS B ON B.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D_ID = A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D AS C ON C.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL AS D ON D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = C.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER ON SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID = D.SUPPLIER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = C.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = C.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN DOC ON DOC.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = A.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = A.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN INSPECTION_ITEM ON INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID = B.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN DEFECTIVE_REASONS ON DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID = B.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = A.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp WHERE D.DOC_NO = #{arrivalDocNo} AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode}

SELECT SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierCode, SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName FROM SUPPLIER
SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER_NAME LIKE concat('%',#{supplierName},'%')

SELECT C.UDF021 customerNum, D.DOC_NO purchaseNo, I.ITEM_CODE itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME itemName, I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, B.BUSINESS_QTY qty, UNIT.UNIT_NAME unitName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL A LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D B ON A.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = B.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D C ON C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER D ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{arrivalNo} AND INSPECTION_STATUS = '4' AND RECEIPT_CLOSE = '0'
SELECT barcode FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE lot_att04 = #{arrivalDocNo} AND item_no = #{itemCode}

SELECT A.checkDocNo, B.id, C.wpid_id, C.udf01, C.udf02, C.udf03 FROM WMS_PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION A LEFT JOIN WMS_PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D B ON A.checkDocNo = B.checkDocNo LEFT JOIN WMS_PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_D_MEASUREMENT_VALUE C ON C.wpid_id = B.id WHERE B.id= #{checkDUuid} --A.checkDocNo = 'Q100-202506230056' AND ( C.udf01 IS NOT NULL OR C.udf02 IS NOT NULL OR C.udf03 IS NOT NULL );
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deliveryList WHERE deliveryNumber = #{number}

SELECT DISTINCT Z.UDF003 containerQty, Z.UDF024 containerName, CAST(CAST(Z.LONG AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.HIGH AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.WIDE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS containerDetail, D.purchaseOrder, deliveryNumber, purchaseOrder docNo, ISNULL(lot_att04,'') arrivalNo, ISNULL(lot_att30,'') lot_att30, FORMAT(create_date, 'yyyyMMdd') docDate, vendorCode supplierNo, delivery supplierName, item_no itemCode, M.ITEM_NAME itemName, M.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, ISNULL(Z.UDF021,'') binCode, qty matchQty, barcode, B.UDF021 customerNo, bm_barcode_detail.unit_no unitCode, bm_barcode_detail.unit_name unitName, consignee shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid=Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE bar_type = 4 AND lot_att30 = '2' AND (lot_att08 = '1' OR lot_att08 IS NULL)
and deliveryNumber = #{number}

SELECT DISTINCT standard_col10, D.parentId, bar_type, Z.UDF003 containerQty, Z.UDF024 containerName, CAST(CAST(Z.LONG AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.HIGH AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '*' + CAST(CAST(Z.WIDE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS containerDetail, D.purchaseOrder, deliveryNumber, purchaseOrder docNo, ISNULL(lot_att04,'') arrivalNo, ISNULL(lot_att30,'') lot_att30, FORMAT(create_date, 'yyyyMMdd') docDate, vendorCode supplierNo, delivery supplierName, item_no itemCode, M.ITEM_NAME itemName, M.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, ISNULL(Z.UDF021,'') binCode, qty matchQty, barcode, B.UDF021 customerNo, bm_barcode_detail.unit_no unitCode, bm_barcode_detail.unit_name unitName, consignee shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid=Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE bar_type = 4 AND lot_att30 IS NULL and standard_col10 = (SELECT id FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barcode}) ORDER BY item_no

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT parentId) FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid WHERE barcode IN
#{barcode}

SELECT id, lot_att01 AS parentId, lot_att02 AS arrivalNo, lot_att03 AS deliveryNumber, lot_att04 AS docNo, lot_att05 AS supplierNo, lot_att06 AS supplierName, lot_att07 AS customerNo, standard_col11 AS containerQty, lot_att08 AS containerName, lot_att09 AS containerDetail, lot_att10 AS standard_col10, lot_att11 AS bar_type, barcode, org_no AS shjg, qty AS matchQty, warehouse_no AS warehouseCode, cell_no AS binCode, combination_lot_no AS docDate, item_no AS itemCode, item_name AS itemName, item_spec AS itemSpec, unit_no AS unitCode, unit_name AS unitName, create_by AS createBy FROM purchase_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 100
AND lot_att03 like '%' + #{deliveryNumber} + '%'
ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM purchase_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 100

SELECT RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL ON PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID = PURCHASE_ARRIVAL.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_ID WHERE PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = #{arrivalDUuid}

SELECT C.DOC_NO AS oddNumber,C.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME AS supplierFullName,D.UDF021 AS customerNumber,WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode FROM PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION A LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D B ON B.PURCHASE_ARRIVAL_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON B.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER C ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D D ON D.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AND A.ITEM_ID = D.ITEM_ID WHERE A.PO_ARRIVAL_INSPECTION_ID = #{inspectionUuid} AND A.ApproveStatus = 'Y' AND A.DECISION = '2'
SELECT barcode,lot_att30 lotAtt30, lot_att08 lotAtt08 FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT D.purchaseOrder, B.UDF021 customerNo, item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, B.PRICE_QTY priceQty, B.PRICE price, SUBSTRING(CAST(B.PLAN_ARRIVAL_DATE AS VARCHAR(255)),1,25) planArrivalDate, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName, E.EMPLOYEE_NAME employeeName, lot_att30 FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails D ON source_no = D.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON D.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON D.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD SD ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = SD.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON SD.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN deliveryList SS ON SS.uuid = D.parentId WHERE barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT dd.uuid,deliveryNumber,dd.purchaseOrder,M.ITEM_CODE itemCode,M.ITEM_NAME itemName,M.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec,dd.deliveryNum FROM deliveryNoteDetails dd LEFT JOIN deliveryList d on dd.parentId = d.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON dd.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON dd.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE deliveryNumber = #{number}

SELECT dd.uuid,deliveryNumber,dd.purchaseOrder,M.ITEM_CODE itemCode,M.ITEM_NAME itemName,M.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec,dd.deliveryNum FROM deliveryNoteDetails dd LEFT JOIN deliveryList d on dd.parentId = d.uuid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER A ON dd.purchaseOrder LIKE CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', '%') LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON dd.purchaseOrder = CONCAT(A.DOC_NO, '-', B.SequenceNumber) AND A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM M ON B.ITEM_ID = M.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE deliveryNumber = #{number} AND dd.arrivalNo IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delivery_summary D LEFT JOIN bm_barcode_detail ON source_no = D.uuid WHERE barcode = #{number} AND creator = #{createBy}

SELECT CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', REVERSE(deliveryNoteDetails.purchaseOrder)) > 0 THEN REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(deliveryNoteDetails.purchaseOrder), 1, CHARINDEX('-', REVERSE(deliveryNoteDetails.purchaseOrder)) - 1)) ELSE deliveryNoteDetails.purchaseOrder -- 如果没有横杠返回原值 END AS last_part FROM bm_barcode_detail LEFT JOIN deliveryNoteDetails ON uuid = source_no WHERE barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT B.BUSINESS_QTY AS businessQty, E.EMPLOYEE_CODE AS employeeCode, AU.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE AS adminUnitCode, AU.START_DATE AS startDate, MO.DOC_NO AS moDoc, A.DOC_NO AS docNo, (SELECT DOC_CODE FROM DOC WHERE DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID) AS purchaseOrderCode, (SELECT DOC_CODE FROM DOC WHERE DOC.DOC_ID = PARA_DOC_ALS.DOC_ID) AS arrivalOrderCode, (SELECT UNIT_CODE FROM UNIT WHERE UNIT_ID = B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID) AS businessUnitCode, (SELECT UNIT_CODE FROM UNIT WHERE UNIT_ID = B.PRICE_UNIT_ID) AS priceUnitCode, B.SequenceNumber AS sequenceNumberD, C.SequenceNumber AS sequenceNumberSD, S.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierCode, S.SUPPLIER_FULL_NAME AS supplierFullName, A.TAX_BC AS taxBc, A.TAX_INCLUDED AS taxIncluded, A.TAX_OC AS taxOc, TAX.TAX_RATE AS taxRate, TC.DEDUCTIBLE_INDICATOR AS vatDeductible, A.PURCHASE_TYPE AS purchaseType, CURRENCY.CURRENCY_CODE AS currencyCode, B.STANDARD_PRICE AS standardPrice, SUPPLY_CENTER.SUPPLY_CENTER_CODE AS supplyCenterCode, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS plantCode, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, B.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName, B.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, B.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, B.PRICE AS price, TAX.TAX_CODE AS taxCode, B.INVENTORY_QTY AS inventoryQty, B.DISCOUNTED_PRICE AS discountedPrice, PAYMENT_TERM.PAYMENT_TERM_CODE AS paymentCode, PAYMENT_TERM.PAYMENT_TERM_TYPE AS paymentType, ISNULL(ITEM_PLANT.INSPECT_MODE, 0) AS inspectMode, A.EXCHANGE_RATE AS exchangeRate, TIC.TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY_CODE AS taxInvoiceCategoryCode FROM PURCHASE_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY TIC ON TIC.TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY_ID = A.TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AU ON AU.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = A.Owner_Dept LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp LEFT JOIN PARA_DOC_ALS ON PARA_DOC_ALS.SOURCE_DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_D B ON A.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = B.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN MO ON MO.MO_ID = B.SOURCE_ID_ROid LEFT JOIN PAYMENT_TERM ON A.PAYMENT_TERM_ID = PAYMENT_TERM.PAYMENT_TERM_ID LEFT JOIN TAX ON TAX.TAX_ID = B.TAX_ID LEFT JOIN TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY TC ON TAX.TAX_CODE = TC.TAX_INVOICE_CATEGORY_CODE LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID AND A.REV_ORG_SOURCE_ID_ROid = ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_SD C ON B.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID = C.PURCHASE_ORDER_D_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON C.RECEIVE_Owner_Org_ROid=PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON A.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN CURRENCY ON CURRENCY.CURRENCY_ID = A.CURRENCY_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLY_CENTER ON SUPPLY_CENTER.SUPPLY_CENTER_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND B.SequenceNumber = #{orderNum}
SELECT TOP 1 B.EMPLOYEE_CODE FROM WMS..warehouseStaff A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.employeeName = B.EMPLOYEE_NAME WHERE warehouseCode = #{warehouseCode} AND type = 'QC' ORDER BY A.employeeName

SELECT A.[帐号] AS qywx FROM QYWX A LEFT JOIN [USER] ON [USER].USER_NAME = A.[姓名] LEFT JOIN V_EMPLOYEE_SUPPLIER V ON [USER].LOGONNAME = V.EMPLOYEE_CODE WHERE V.EMPLOYEE_CODE IS NOT NULL AND V.SUPPLIER_CODE = #{supplierCode}

update.foreach: UPDATE deliveryList SET arrivalNo = CASE -- 当arrivalNo为空或null时，直接设置为新值 WHEN arrivalNo IS NULL OR arrivalNo = '' THEN #{item.docNo} -- 当arrivalNo已有值时，在原有值后追加新值（用逗号分隔） ELSE CONCAT(arrivalNo, ',', #{item.docNo}) END WHERE uuid = #{item.uuid}

mapper.update: UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET lot_att31 = NULL WHERE barcode IN ( SELECT barcode FROM purchase_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 100 )
UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET lot_att31 = NULL WHERE barcode = ( SELECT barcode FROM purchase_summary WHERE id = #{id} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 100 )

WITH UserCTE AS ( SELECT TOP 1 USER_ID FROM [USER] WHERE LOGONNAME = #{createBy} ORDER BY USER_ID ) UPDATE PA SET PA.CreateBy = [USER].USER_ID, PA.ModifiedBy = U.USER_ID, PA.LastModifiedBy = U.USER_ID,ApproveBy = U.USER_ID FROM PURCHASE_ARRIVAL PA CROSS APPLY UserCTE U LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = PA.Owner_Emp LEFT JOIN [USER] ON [USER].USER_NAME = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME WHERE PA.DOC_NO = #{docNo}
